case_title: 473 ELLIS, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. DEMARCUS JOHNSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-27-2026.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED AUG-30-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 473 ELLIS, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DEMARCUS DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 473 ELLIS STREET #701, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
